items.title: Da Vinci Assist
items.description: Art association management with a full dashboard for handling members, registrations, and email announcements.
highlights: Full dashboard for managing around one hundred members.
Secure processing of Excel files from Google Forms.
Creation and sending of email announcements with HTML generation.

items.title: Local School Management
items.description: User interface for school administration with attendance, schedules, and salary tracking.
highlights: Administrative management interface for a local school.

items.title: Intelligent Scheduling System
items.description: Scheduling algorithm designed to generate and manage class timetables efficiently.
highlights: Design of a timetable management algorithm.

items.title: Haiko App
items.description: Platform to promote Malagasy culture with a Next.js interface, Django backend, and LLM-based voice generation.
highlights: Django backend for managing cultural data.
Malagasy voice generation powered by a Hugging Face model.

items.title: Food Reservation App
items.description: Food reservation and delivery system with a React front office and a Nest.js / Node.js back office.
highlights: Front office for search, booking, and delivery tracking.
Back office for menus, ingredients, and costs.
Optimized route algorithm for delivery drivers.
